notes: Major UI overhaul: (1) Light theme default (warm cream/charcoal) with dark mode toggle. (2) Green accent everywhere (replaces gold). All hard-coded gold rgba mapped to theme-aware --accent-* variables. (3) Mobile app skin: hamburger removed, bottom tab bar (Budget/Journal/More-button/Projection/More), FAB for adding transactions, bottom-sheet style modals on mobile (slide up from bottom with grab handle). (4) Projection sheet first column properly wraps text (no overlap), width 180-220px desktop / 140-160px mobile, nested spans wrap too. (5) Charts adapt to theme via CSS variables. (6) Theme preference persisted in localStorage.
